channel.title: Vela — AI Intelligence Magazine
channel.description: 매주 월요일 자동 발행되는 AI 매거진. 파편을 매거진으로, 신호를 항해로.

item.title: [Cover] Let's build GPT · 처음부터 만드는 GPT
item.description: 이번 주 Vela가 추천하는 깊이 있는 강의. Andrej Karpathy의 시그니처.

item.title: [Robotics] AsgardBench: A benchmark for visually grounded interactive planning
item.description: Imagine a robot tasked with cleaning a kitchen. It needs to observe its environment, decide what to do, and adjust when things don’t go as expected, for example, when the mug it was tasked to wash is already clean, or the sink is full

item.title: [Audio] Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
item.description: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

item.title: [Agent] Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
item.description: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

item.title: [Robotics] Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
item.description: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.

item.title: [Audio] Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
item.description: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

item.title: [LLM] 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
item.description: Illustration showing a person with a Pixel phone in a beach town farmers' market by the water

item.title: [LLM] 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
item.description: The Road to Google Marketing Live graphic. May 20, 2026, 9am PT. White background with colorful bottom gradient.

item.title: [LLM] Partnering with industry leaders to accelerate AI transformation
item.description: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.

item.title: [Agent] We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
item.description: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.

item.title: [Tool] Here’s how our TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads.
item.description: Learn how Google’s TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads with this new video.

item.title: [Vision] Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
item.description: Aerial image of the data center

item.title: [Agent] OpenAI’s New GPT-5.5 Powers Codex on NVIDIA Infrastructure — and NVIDIA Is Already Putting It to Work
item.description: AI agents have revolutionized developer workflows, and their next frontier is knowledge work: processing information, solving complex problems, coming up with new ideas and driving innovation. Codex, OpenAI’s agentic coding application, is

item.title: [LLM] 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
item.description: Black screen with illustrations including a laptop with document and email icons streaming out, a smiling person holding a phone and looking at a checklist, and a user activating Gemini Live

item.title: [LLM] OpenAI available at FedRAMP Moderate
item.description: OpenAI is available at FedRAMP Moderate authorization for ChatGPT Enterprise and the OpenAI API, enabling secure AI adoption for U.S. federal agencies.

item.title: [LLM] The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
item.description: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

item.title: [Agent] Join the new AI Agents Vibe Coding Course from Google and Kaggle
item.description: A web next to a laptop

item.title: [LLM] Announcing our partnership with the Republic of Korea
item.description: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models

item.title: [Safety] Our commitment to community safety
item.description: Learn how OpenAI protects community safety in ChatGPT through model safeguards, misuse detection, policy enforcement, and collaboration with safety experts.

item.title: [LLM] Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
item.description: The Google Translate logo sits in the middle of colorful illustrated scenes, including people translating live conversations and a birthday cake topped by candles with the numeral 20

item.title: [LLM] Where the goblins came from
item.description: How goblin outputs spread in AI models: timeline, root cause, and fixes behind personality-driven quirks in GPT-5 behavior.

item.title: [Featured] 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
item.description: The Road to Google Marketing Live graphic. May 20, 2026, 9am PT. White background with colorful bottom gradient.

item.title: [Featured] Partnering with industry leaders to accelerate AI transformation
item.description: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.

item.title: [Featured] We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
item.description: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.

item.title: [Featured] Here’s how our TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads.
item.description: Learn how Google’s TPUs power increasingly demanding AI workloads with this new video.

item.title: [Featured] Elevating Austria: Google invests in its first data center in the Alps.
item.description: Aerial image of the data center
